title: geniostoma pumilum
intro: Geniostoma pumilum, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is also known as the 'purple coral bush' or 'purple coral vine' due to its vibrant purple flowers and woody stems. The plant has been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Geniostoma pumilum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In herbal preparations, Geniostoma pumilum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine and modern herbalism.
